interpretation_summary: No statistical results could be interpreted because the replication script never ran to completion. Multiple rounds of Docker rebuilding were undertaken to pre-install the required R packages (lme4, mice, tidyverse) and their system libraries; however, when the analysis script was invoked it still failed at the first line that loads lme4. In the last attempt the script was modified to call install.packages() during run time, but the non-root user (“runner”) did not have write permission to /usr/local/lib/R/site-library, so the package installation aborted and the script halted. Consequently, no models were estimated and no coefficients were produced to compare with the original study. The replication therefore provides no evidence for or against the preregistered hypothesis.

fidelity_assessment.method_alignment: Planned method (multilevel linear mixed model with lme4 on the supplied ESS Round 5 files) was retained; data files were present and script matched preregistration. The only divergence was the ad-hoc insertion of install.packages() inside the analysis script, introduced during debugging, which is not in the preregistration but was meant only to salvage the run.

deviations.issue_description: Runtime installation of R packages inside analysis script (install.packages) not foreseen in plan and executed under a user with no write permission.
deviations.impact: High: caused immediate termination of the script and prevented any analysis output.

results_comparison.hypothesis_tested: Higher individual concern about immigration (imm_concern) is associated with greater distrust in the national parliament (trstprl_rev).
results_comparison.original_results: Coefficient for immigration concern ≈ 0.17 (p < 0.01) in three-level model using ESS Rounds 1–4 (McLaren 2012).
results_comparison.replication_results: No replication coefficients produced – script failed before model estimation.
results_comparison.overall_answer: No – replication could not be evaluated because execution failed.

replication_report: Replication inconclusive: analysis script failed to run (lme4 package missing). No statistical results generated to assess the focal claim.

failure_handling.suggestions: Pre-install required R packages during Docker build stage under root and set R_LIBS_USER for the non-root account; alternatively run container as root or write to a user-writable library path.
Remove any install.packages calls from the analysis script to avoid permission problems and keep methods identical to preregistration.

notes: Once the environment issue is resolved, the data and code appear ready for estimation. Future attempts should verify library availability inside the container before switching to the non-root user.
